political.s: Allegiant Air reported $87,001 in contributions in the 2024 cycle and $615,000 in lobbying activity in 2024. The company did not make direct contributions to federal candidates in 2024, indicating minimal direct political engagement.

charity.s: Allegiant donated more than $1 million annually to Make-A-Wish Foundation and has flown over 2,000 children with critical illnesses since 2012. The company focuses on medical assistance, community safety, and STEM education in its corporate giving program.
charity.focus: Medical assistance (Make-A-Wish), community safety, STEM education

environment.s: Allegiant has set a 2030 decarbonization target to reduce tank-to-wake emissions by 10% per revenue ton kilometer. In 2021, per-passenger fuel consumption was 12% more efficient than industry average. However, DitchCarbon rated the company 19/100 and noted absence of Science Based Targets initiative commitments.

labor.s: Teamsters Union reported allegations of stalled pilot contract negotiations lasting over four years, claims of over $200 million in unpaid pilot bonuses, and alleged violations of the Railway Labor Act regarding training requirements. Multiple sources indicate labor tensions and fairness concerns.

dei.s: Allegiant reported board diversity of 25% female and 12.5% ethnically diverse as of 2021. The company established a Diversity and Inclusivity Council and network groups. However, Forbes 2020 Diversity Report Card gave Allegiant Air a D- for airline executive team diversity.

execPay.s: CEO John Redmond earned $10,175,198 total compensation while average employee salaries range from $40,000-$87,000. First officers start at $51,000 annually, indicating significant pay disparity between executive and entry-level positions.

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy
